'''''36DD''''' (nicknamed the ''Deedee'') was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Freighter/Legends|barge]]. In [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]], ''36DD'' was to pick up a [[Colony Class 23669 power generator]] at [[Kuat Drive Yards/Legends|Kuat Drive Yards]], but a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] team led by [[Deen Voorson]] and [[Boo Rawl]] disguised the Rebel ship ''[[Long Run]]'' as ''36DD'', took the barge carrying the generator, and escaped as the real ship entered the system.<ref name="Slaying" />

==Appearances==
*{{JournalCite|9|Slaying Dragons|reprint=1}} {{1st}}
